candidate_llm_application: LLM fine-tuning recovery from low-diversity bottleneck: after aggressive distillation, effective diversity drops; recovery via migration (data augmentation) restores it.

results.title: Fine-Tuning Diversity Collapse: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on fine-tuning diversity collapse, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (fine-tuning diversity collapse); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (conservation-biology terms vs LLM terms).
